case_title: J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA VS PINGUELO JOSEPH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,764.15 FILED BY J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA AS TO DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH $3,764.15 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,776.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR APR-13-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-13-1992, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINGUELO JOSEPH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO M LEE
MOTION RECALL/VACATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF J. C. LUKRICH & COMPANY, CPA HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT GRANTED. JUDGMENT AT NEW TRIAL AS FOLLOWS: DISMISSED WITH OUT PREJUDICE. PER AGATHA HOFF.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECALL/VACATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OF JUN-24-1992, GRANTED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT MATURED INSTALLMENT TO DEF. ON FILE.
